title: Replace dead tslint.json with ESLint + eslint-plugin-svelte
description:
tslint.json references tslint:recommended and tslint-react. TSLint was deprecated in 2020 and has had no maintenance since. Neither rule set applies to the current Svelte/Astro stack. The file is unused by the build process (package.json has no lint script referencing it) and causes confusion.

Fix: Delete tslint.json. Add ESLint with eslint-plugin-svelte, @typescript-eslint/eslint-plugin, and eslint-plugin-astro. Add a lint script to package.json.

title: Migrate Google Analytics from UA to GA4
description: BaseLayout.astro uses the legacy Universal Analytics tracking ID UA-131553259-1. A comment in the code notes this may need GA4 migration. Universal Analytics stopped processing data in July 2023. Need to: 1) Get or create a GA4 measurement ID (G-XXXXXXX format), 2) Replace the gtag.js snippet in BaseLayout.astro with the GA4 version.

title: Move CloudFront distribution ID and AWS profile out of deploy.sh
description:
deploy.sh line 14 hardcodes CLOUDFRONT_DISTRIBUTION_ID='E4GK98O8DHP44' and AWS_PROFILE to a personal profile name. While CloudFront IDs are not secrets, committing infrastructure identifiers enables targeted invalidation floods (billed beyond free tier). The hardcoded AWS_PROFILE makes the script non-portable for CI/CD.

Fix: Source CLOUDFRONT_DISTRIBUTION_ID and AWS_PROFILE from environment variables with sane defaults or error if unset.

title: Fix RSS API: add fetch timeout, sanitize errors, fix filename, fix XML parser
description:
src/pages/api/rss.xml.ts has multiple issues:
1. No fetch timeout — if mediabiasfactcheck.com is slow the function hangs indefinitely. Fix: use AbortController with a 5s timeout.
2. Error messages exposed to clients (line 108 returns error.message directly) including upstream URL and HTTP status.
3. File is named rss.xml.ts but serves JSON — misleading for maintainers and API consumers.
4. Regex-based XML parsing is fragile — breaks on nested CDATA, attributes with > characters, namespaced tags, encoding declarations. The decodeHtmlEntities function uses String.fromCharCode instead of String.fromCodePoint for supplementary Unicode characters. The strip-tags regex on line 67 corrupts text with > in attribute values.
5. Verify whether output mode in astro.config.mjs correctly supports SSR API routes.

title: Create /embed page with GitHub Gist embed instructions
description: The old React app had an /embed page that showed: 1) Heading 'Adding to your Website', 2) Explanatory text about embedding the search engine, 3) An embedded GitHub Gist (drmikecrowe/dcfbc60a1155ac175dee4b433f9d07a6, file embed.js) via react-embed-gist. Need to create src/pages/embed.astro with equivalent content. Can use a simple script tag or iframe to embed the gist instead of the React component.

title: Fix window.location.replace breaking browser back button in Header.astro
description:
Header.astro lines 49-63 use window.location.replace(href) in the click handler to work around GCSE URL manipulation. replace() removes the current page from browser history, so the back button does not return after clicking a nav link.

Fix: Use window.location.assign(href) instead. It still bypasses GCSE's event interception while preserving browser history.

title: Remove XSS vector: {@html} with localStorage value in Search.svelte
description:
Search.svelte line 193 uses {@html ``} where selectedEngine is loaded from localStorage. This bypasses Svelte's escaping. While the current call sites validate selectedEngine against a known list, any future code path or poisoned localStorage value could inject raw HTML.\n\nFix: Remove the {@html} block entirely. Replace with
. The loadGCSE() function already handles GCSE injection via a static string (line 142) and reconstructs the container on mount anyway, making the defaultToRefinement attribute in the static render redundant.

title: Add pagination and sorting to Hosts table on Sites page
description: The old React Sites page used react-strap-table ServerTable with: 50 items per page, sortable by Site name and Bias columns, bordered + hover styling. The new Astro Hosts.astro renders ALL hosts in a plain static table with no pagination or sorting. Need to either: 1) Add client-side pagination/sorting via a Svelte island, or 2) Use a lightweight JS approach for table interactivity. The table has 2000+ rows so pagination is important for UX.

title: Add search engine dropdown selector to homepage
description: Port the search engine dropdown from the main site. The GCSE has9 refinements: Left, Left-Center, Least, Right-Center, Right, Pro-Science, Left Leaning, Right Leaning, Mostly Center. Need a dropdown to select which refinement/engine to search before the user types their query.

title: Fix index.astro to use Search.svelte island instead of inline script
description: The current src/pages/index.astro has inline GCSE script injection rather than importing Search.svelte as a client:load island. The built dist/index.html from a previous build shows the Search.svelte island working correctly. Need to reconcile: import Search.svelte and use it with client:load directive, remove the inline script approach.

title: Add Content Security Policy headers via CloudFront response header policy
description:
The site loads three third-party scripts (Google CSE, Google Analytics, formerly ShareThis) with no Content Security Policy restricting what scripts can run. No Subresource Integrity hashes are present on externally-loaded scripts.

Fix: Configure a CloudFront response header policy with a CSP scoped to known origins (googletagmanager.com, cse.google.com, etc.). This significantly reduces XSS exposure surface. Also consider adding SRI hashes to the gtag.js script tag in BaseLayout.astro.

title: Add noreferrer to external links in MbfcNews.svelte
description:
MbfcNews.svelte lines 152 and 201 use rel='noopener' on external links without noreferrer. This is inconsistent with all other external links in the codebase (which use noopener noreferrer) and sends the HTTP Referer header to MBFC, leaking the source URL.

Fix: Change rel='noopener' to rel='noopener noreferrer' on both external link elements.

title: Clean up duplicate data files and unused Sites.astro component
description: Cleanup items: 1) biases.json and hosts.json exist in both src/data/ (build-time imports) and public/assets/ (copied to dist). The public/assets copies may be unnecessary since Astro components import from src/data/. 2) src/components/Sites.astro wraps Biases + Hosts but sites.astro page imports them directly - remove the unused wrapper. 3) Remove .backup-react/ directory once migration is verified complete.
close_reason: Cleaned up: removed unused biases.json, hosts.json, and .backup-react/ directory

title: Add MbfcNews feed to homepage
description: The old React homepage showed Search + MbfcNews RSS feed below it. The new Astro homepage only has Search with a placeholder div (comment says 'MbfcNews.svelte will be mounted here in Phase 4'). MbfcNews.svelte already exists and works on the About page. Need to import and render it on index.astro with client:visible.

title: Delete legacy CRA public/index.html being copied into dist/
description:
public/index.html is the old Create React App entry point containing un-substituted %PUBLIC_URL% placeholders, a ShareThis third-party tracker SDK (platform-api.sharethis.com), and a Google AdSense publisher ID. Astro copies everything in public/ into dist/, so this file is being deployed and may overwrite the Astro-generated dist/index.html.

Action: Audit the entire public/ directory for legacy React artifacts. Delete public/index.html and any other stale CRA files (old manifest.json, 2020 sitemap.xml). Keep only files intentionally served as static assets (robots.txt, favicon, google verification file if still needed).

title: Modernize code
Update deploy.sh for Astro output directory
description: deploy.sh still references SITE_DIR='build/' from the old React/webpack setup. Astro outputs to dist/. Need to change SITE_DIR='build/' to SITE_DIR='dist/' in deploy.sh.

title: Remove console.log debug statement from Search.svelte production code
description:
Search.svelte line 161 contains console.log('[GCSE] handleEngineChange() called with:', newEngine) which fires on every engine dropdown change. This appears in users' browser consoles in production.

Fix: Remove the console.log or gate it behind import.meta.env.DEV.

title: Fix $derived thunk bug in SitesTable.svelte
description: SitesTable.svelte lines 195-199 and 244-259 use $derived(() => {...}) which stores a function rather than a value. This is semantically incorrect in Svelte 5 — $derived should receive an expression that evaluates directly to a value, not a thunk. It works today but relies on an implementation detail that could break in a future Svelte release. Also, visiblePages() is called twice per render on line 415 which is inefficient.\n\nFix: Replace $derived(() => { ... return x }) with $derived(x) directly. For paginatedSources: $derived(filteredSources.slice((currentPage - 1) * ITEMS_PER_PAGE, currentPage * ITEMS_PER_PAGE)). For visiblePages: extract computation to a named function and pass the result as the expression. Update template to use paginatedSources and visiblePages without calling them as functions.

title: Fix broken nav links: /home should be / and decide on /embed
description: Header and Footer both link to /home (which 404s since Astro serves / as the homepage) and /embed (page doesn't exist). Need to: 1) Change /home links to / in Header.astro and Footer.astro, 2) Decide whether to create an /embed page or remove it from nav.

title: Optimize SitesTable localStorage cache to store filtered data
description:
SitesTable.svelte lines 112-114: cacheSources() stores the full unfiltered dataset but filterDisplayableSources() is called on every cache read (line 100), re-filtering on every page load. This wastes CPU and stores satire/fake-news entries that are never displayed, inflating the localStorage payload unnecessarily.

Fix: Either cache the already-filtered data (call filterDisplayableSources before cacheSources), or document the intentional choice to always filter. Also, the filteredSources.filter(s => isIncluded(s)).length on line 331 iterates the full array on every render — move to a $derived counter.

title: Fix MbfcNews: replace broken API with RSS slider
description: The rss2json API is broken. Need to: 1) Parse RSS feed directly from https://mediabiasfactcheck.com/feed/2) Create a carousel/slider showing each story for ~3 seconds3) Place towards bottom of homepage

title: Remove dead Universal Analytics and migrate to GA4 or remove tracking
description:
BaseLayout.astro lines 28, 80, 84 load Google Analytics with a UA-131553259-1 property ID. Universal Analytics was sunsetted by Google in July 2023 and no longer records data. The gtag.js script still loads ~50KB on every page for zero benefit. Additionally, window.GA_MEASUREMENT_ID referenced on line 84 is never set anywhere, so the hardcoded fallback always runs. The ID is also duplicated between the variable and the inline script string.

Action: Either migrate to GA4 with a proper G- measurement ID sourced from an environment variable, or remove GA tracking entirely until migration is planned. Do not load a dead tracking library on every page.
